Autocomplete.title: Basic usage
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Filter modes
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit5">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit5">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit5" filter="starts-with" case-sensitive="">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Custom filtering
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit4">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit4">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete class="custom-filter" for="fruit4">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: No data
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit6">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit6" value="Pear">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit6" no-data-label="No data">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Initial load
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="state">State</label>
  <input id="state">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete class="lazy" for="state">
  <m3e-loading-indicator slot="loading"></m3e-loading-indicator>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Search as you type
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="state2">State</label>
  <input id="state2">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete class="search" for="state2" filter="none">
  <m3e-loading-indicator slot="loading"></m3e-loading-indicator>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Requiring an option to be selected
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit2">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit2" value="Apple">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit2" required>
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Automatic activation
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit3">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit3">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit3" auto-activate="">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

Autocomplete.title: Chips
Autocomplete.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit7">Choose your favorite fruits</label>
  <m3e-input-chip-set aria-label="Enter favorite fruits">
    <input id="fruit7" slot="input" placeholder="Add fruit...">
  </m3e-input-chip-set>
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit7">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>

</m3e-bottom-sheet>

SplitButton.title: Density
SplitButton.html:
<m3e-split-button size="extra-small" class="density-3">
  <m3e-button slot="leading-button"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="edit"></m3e-icon>Edit</m3e-button>
  <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-button">
    <m3e-icon name="keyboard_arrow_down"></m3e-icon>
    <m3e-menu-trigger for="menu3"></m3e-menu-trigger>
  </m3e-icon-button>
</m3e-split-button>
<m3e-menu id="menu3" position-x="before" class="density-3">

  <m3e-menu-item>Delete</m3e-menu-item>
</m3e-menu>

  </m3e-split-pane>
</m3e-split-pane>

Tabs.title: Basic usage
Tabs.html:
<m3e-tabs>
  <m3e-tab selected for="videos"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="videocam"></m3e-icon>Video</m3e-tab>
  <m3e-tab for="photos"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="photo"></m3e-icon>Photos</m3e-tab>
  <m3e-tab for="audio"><m3e-icon slot="icon" name="music_note"></m3e-icon>Audio</m3e-tab>
  <m3e-tab-panel id="videos">Videos</m3e-tab-panel>
  <m3e-tab-panel id="photos">Photos</m3e-tab-panel>

Theme.title: Density
Theme.html:
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="-3">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">-3 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="-2">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">-2 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="-1">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">-1 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="0">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">0 (default) density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>
<m3e-theme strong-focus="" density="1">
  <m3e-button variant="filled" size="medium">1 density</m3e-button>
</m3e-theme>

<m3e-toolbar variant="standard">

  <m3e-icon-button>

  </m3e-icon-button>

    <m3e-icon name="add"></m3e-icon>

</m3e-toolbar>
